name: Easy BBQ Pork Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 Bottle of your favorite bbq sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roast, garlic, and onion in a crock pot on high.
2. Add salt and pepper and a little water.
3. Cook on high until the pork can be easily shredded with a fork (about 5 hours).
4. Remove the roast and shred the meat, removing most of the fat and bone.
5. Strain the grease from the crock pot, keeping any garlic/onion bits.
6. Place the shredded meat back in the crock pot with the remaining bits.
7. Pour BBQ sauce over until fully covered; mix well.
8. Continue cooking on low for about 3 hours.
9. Serve the BBQ pork on Kaiser rolls, onion rolls, pocketbook buns, or any hamburger bun. Enjoy.
